verses.latin_vulgate: Locutusque est Dominus ad Moysen et Aaron, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְדַבֵּ֣ר יְהֹוָ֔ה אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֥ה וְאֶֽל־אַהֲרֹ֖ן לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord spoke to Moses and Aaron, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra puhui Mosekselle ja Aaronille, sanoen:
verses.king_james: And the Lord spake unto Moses and unto Aaron, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Singuli per turmas, signa, atque vexilla, et domos cognationum suarum, castrametabuntur filii Israël, per gyrum tabernaculi fœderis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִ֣ישׁ עַל־דִּגְל֤וֹ בְאֹתֹת֙ לְבֵ֣ית אֲבֹתָ֔ם יַחֲנ֖וּ בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל מִנֶּ֕גֶד סָבִ֥יב לְאֹֽהֶל־מוֹעֵ֖ד יַחֲנֽוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: All the children of Israel shall camp by their troops, ensigns, and standards, and the houses of their kindreds, round about the tabernacle of the covenant.
verses.finnish_biblia: Israelin lapset pitää itsensä sioittaman, jokainen lippunsa ja merkkinsä alle, isäinsä huoneen jälkeen: sille kohdalle ympäri seurakunnan majaa pitää heidän itsensä sioittaman.
verses.king_james: Every man of the children of Israel shall pitch by his own standard, with the ensign of their father’s house: far off about the tabernacle of the congregation shall they pitch.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ad orientem Judas figet tentoria per turmas exercitus sui : eritque princeps filiorum ejus Nahasson filius Aminadab.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַחֹנִים֙ קֵ֣דְמָה מִזְרָ֔חָה דֶּ֛גֶל מַחֲנֵ֥ה יְהוּדָ֖ה לְצִבְאֹתָ֑ם וְנָשִׂיא֙ לִבְנֵ֣י יְהוּדָ֔ה נַחְשׁ֖וֹן בֶּן־עַמִּינָדָֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: On the east Juda shall pitch his tents by the bands of his army: and the prince of his sons; shall be Nahasson the son of Aminadab.
verses.finnish_biblia: Etiselle puolelle itään päin pitää Juudan lippunsa ja joukkonsa kanssa itsensä sioittaman: heidän päämiehensä Nahesson Amminadabin poika,
verses.king_james: And on the east side toward the rising of the sun shall they of the standard of the camp of Judah pitch throughout their armies: and Nahshon the son of Amminadab shall be captain of the children of Judah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et omnis de stirpe ejus summa pugnantium, septuaginta quatuor millia sexcenti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּצְבָא֖וֹ וּפְקֻדֵיהֶ֑ם אַרְבָּעָ֧ה וְשִׁבְעִ֛ים אֶ֖לֶף וְשֵׁ֥שׁ מֵאֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the whole sum of the fighting men of his stock, were seventy-four thousand six hundred.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hänen joukkonsa luetut, neljäkahdeksattakymmentä tuhatta ja kuusisataa.
verses.king_james: And his host, and those that were numbered of them, were threescore and fourteen thousand and six hundred.

verses.latin_vulgate: Juxta eum castrametati sunt de tribu Issachar, quorum princeps fuit Nathanaël filius Suar.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַחֹנִ֥ים עָלָ֖יו מַטֵּ֣ה יִשָּׂשכָ֑ר וְנָשִׂיא֙ לִבְנֵ֣י יִשָּׂשכָ֔ר נְתַנְאֵ֖ל בֶּן־צוּעָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Next unto him they of the tribe of Issachar encamped, whose prince was Nathanael, the son of Suar.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hänen viereensä pitää Isaskarin sukukunnan itsensä sioittaman: heidän päämiehensä Netaneel Zuarin poika,
verses.king_james: And those that do pitch next unto him shall be the tribe of Issachar: and Nethaneel the son of Zuar shall be captain of the children of Issachar.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et omnis numerus pugnatorum ejus quinquaginta quatuor millia quadringenti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּצְבָא֖וֹ וּפְקֻדָ֑יו אַרְבָּעָ֧ה וַחֲמִשִּׁ֛ים אֶ֖לֶף וְאַרְבַּ֥ע מֵאֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the whole number of his fighting men were fifty-four thousand four hundred.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hänen joukkonsa luetut, neljäkuudettakymmentä tuhatta ja neljäsataa.
verses.king_james: And his host, and those that were numbered thereof, were fifty and four thousand and four hundred.

verses.latin_vulgate: In tribu Zabulon princeps fuit Eliab filius Helon.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַטֵּ֖ה זְבוּלֻ֑ן וְנָשִׂיא֙ לִבְנֵ֣י זְבוּלֻ֔ן אֱלִיאָ֖ב בֶּן־חֵלֹֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the tribe of Zabulon the prince was Eliab the son of Helon.
verses.finnish_biblia: Senjälkeen Sebulonin sukukunta ja heidän päämiehensä Eliab Helonin poika,
verses.king_james: Then the tribe of Zebulun: and Eliab the son of Helon shall be captain of the children of Zebulun.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnis de stirpe ejus exercitus pugnatorum, quinquaginta septem millia quadringenti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּצְבָא֖וֹ וּפְקֻדָ֑יו שִׁבְעָ֧ה וַחֲמִשִּׁ֛ים אֶ֖לֶף וְאַרְבַּ֥ע מֵאֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And all the army of fighting men of his stock, were fifty-seven thousand four hundred.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hänen joukkonsa luetut, seitsemänkuudettakymmentä tuhatta ja neljäsataa.
verses.king_james: And his host, and those that were numbered thereof, were fifty and seven thousand and four hundred.

verses.latin_vulgate: Universi qui in castris Judæ enumerati sunt, fuerunt centum octoginta sex millia quadringenti : et per turmas suas primi egredientur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּֽל־הַפְּקֻדִ֞ים לְמַחֲנֵ֣ה יְהוּדָ֗ה מְאַ֨ת אֶ֜לֶף וּשְׁמֹנִ֥ים אֶ֛לֶף וְשֵֽׁשֶׁת־אֲלָפִ֥ים וְאַרְבַּע־מֵא֖וֹת לְצִבְאֹתָ֑ם רִאשֹׁנָ֖ה יִסָּֽעוּ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: All that were numbered in the camp of Juda, were a hundred and eighty-six thousand four hundred: and they by their troops shall march first.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kaikki Juudan leirissä luetut, satatuhatta ja kuusiyhdeksättäkymmentä tuhatta ja neljäsataa, heidän joukoissansa: heidän pitää ensinnä vaeltaman.
verses.king_james: All that were numbered in the camp of Judah were an hundred thousand and fourscore thousand and six thousand and four hundred, throughout their armies. These shall first set forth.

verses.latin_vulgate: In castris filiorum Ruben ad meridianam plagam erit princeps Elisur filius Sedeur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דֶּ֣גֶל מַחֲנֵ֧ה רְאוּבֵ֛ן תֵּימָ֖נָה לְצִבְאֹתָ֑ם וְנָשִׂיא֙ לִבְנֵ֣י רְאוּבֵ֔ן אֱלִיצ֖וּר בֶּן־שְׁדֵיאֽוּר׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the camp of the sons of Ruben, on the south side, the prince shall be Elisur the son of Sedeur:
verses.finnish_biblia: Etelän puolelle pitää Rubenin itsensä sioittaman lippunsa ja joukkonsa kanssa, heidän päämiehensä Elitsur Sedeurin poika,
verses.king_james: On the south side shall be the standard of the camp of Reuben according to their armies: and the captain of the children of Reuben shall be Elizur the son of Shedeur.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et cunctus exercitus pugnatorum ejus qui numerati sunt, quadraginta sex millia quingenti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּצְבָא֖וֹ וּפְקֻדָ֑יו שִׁשָּׁ֧ה וְאַרְבָּעִ֛ים אֶ֖לֶף וַחֲמֵ֥שׁ מֵאֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the whole army of his fighting men, that were numbered, were forty-six thousand five hundred.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hänen joukkonsa luetut, kuusiviidettäkymmentä tuhatta ja viisisataa.
verses.king_james: And his host, and those that were numbered thereof, were forty and six thousand and five hundred.

verses.latin_vulgate: Juxta eum castrametati sunt de tribu Simeon : quorum princeps fuit Salamiel filius Surisaddai.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַחוֹנִ֥ם עָלָ֖יו מַטֵּ֣ה שִׁמְע֑וֹן וְנָשִׂיא֙ לִבְנֵ֣י שִׁמְע֔וֹן שְׁלֻמִיאֵ֖ל בֶּן־צוּרִֽישַׁדָּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Beside him camped they of the tribe of Simeon: whose prince was Salamiel the son of Surisaddai.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hänen viereensä pitää Simeonin sukukunnan itsensä sioittaman: heidän päämiehensä Selumiel Suri Saddain poika,
verses.king_james: And those which pitch by him shall be the tribe of Simeon: and the captain of the children of Simeon shall be Shelumiel the son of Zurishaddai.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et cunctus exercitus pugnatorum ejus qui numerati sunt, quinquaginta novem millia trecenti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּצְבָא֖וֹ וּפְקֻדֵיהֶ֑ם תִּשְׁעָ֧ה וַחֲמִשִּׁ֛ים אֶ֖לֶף וּשְׁלֹ֥שׁ מֵאֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the whole army of his fighting men, that were numbered, were fifty-nine thousand three hundred.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hänen joukkonsa luetut, yhdeksänkuudettakymmentä tuhatta ja kolmesataa.
verses.king_james: And his host, and those that were numbered of them, were fifty and nine thousand and three hundred.

verses.latin_vulgate: In tribu Gad princeps fuit Eliasaph filius Duel.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמַטֵּ֖ה גָּ֑ד וְנָשִׂיא֙ לִבְנֵ֣י גָ֔ד אֶלְיָסָ֖ף בֶּן־רְעוּאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the tribe of Gad the prince was Eliasaph the son of Duel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sitälähin Gadin sukukunta, heidän päämiehensä Eliasaph Reguelin poika,
verses.king_james: Then the tribe of Gad: and the captain of the sons of Gad shall be Eliasaph the son of Reuel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et cunctus exercitus pugnatorum ejus, qui numerati sunt, quadraginta quinque millia sexcenti quinquaginta.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּצְבָא֖וֹ וּפְקֻדֵיהֶ֑ם חֲמִשָּׁ֤ה וְאַרְבָּעִים֙ אֶ֔לֶף וְשֵׁ֥שׁ מֵא֖וֹת וַחֲמִשִּֽׁים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the whole army of his righting men that were numbered, were forty-five thousand six hundred and fifty.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja heidän joukkonsa luetut, viisiviidettäkymmentä tuhatta, kuusisataa ja viisikymmentä.
verses.king_james: And his host, and those that were numbered of them, were forty and five thousand and six hundred and fifty.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnes qui recensiti sunt in castris Ruben, centum quinquaginta millia et mille quadringenti quinquaginta per turmas suas : in secundo loco proficiscentur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּֽל־הַפְּקֻדִ֞ים לְמַחֲנֵ֣ה רְאוּבֵ֗ן מְאַ֨ת אֶ֜לֶף וְאֶחָ֨ד וַחֲמִשִּׁ֥ים אֶ֛לֶף וְאַרְבַּע־מֵא֥וֹת וַחֲמִשִּׁ֖ים לְצִבְאֹתָ֑ם וּשְׁנִיִּ֖ם יִסָּֽעוּ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: All that were reckoned up in the camp of Ruben, were a hundred and fifty-one thousand four hundred and fifty, by their troops: they shall march in the second place.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kaikki Rubenin leirissä luetut, satatuhatta, yksikuudettakymmentä tuhatta, neljäsataa ja viisikymmentä heidän joukoissansa. Ja heidän pitää toisena vaeltaman.
verses.king_james: All that were numbered in the camp of Reuben were an hundred thousand and fifty and one thousand and four hundred and fifty, throughout their armies. And they shall set forth in the second rank.

verses.latin_vulgate: Levabitur autem tabernaculum testimonii per officia Levitarum, et turmas eorum : quomodo erigetur, ita et deponetur. Singuli per loca et ordines suos proficiscentur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָסַ֧ע אֹֽהֶל־מוֹעֵ֛ד מַחֲנֵ֥ה הַלְוִיִּ֖ם בְּת֣וֹךְ הַֽמַּחֲנֹ֑ת כַּאֲשֶׁ֤ר יַחֲנוּ֙ כֵּ֣ן יִסָּ֔עוּ אִ֥ישׁ עַל־יָד֖וֹ לְדִגְלֵיהֶֽם׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And the tabernacle of the testimony shall be carried by the officers of the Levites and their troops. As it shall be set up, so shall it be taken down. Every one shall march according to their places, and ranks.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sitte pitää seurakunnan majan vaeltaman Leviläisten leirin kanssa keskileirissä, ja niinkuin he teitänsä sioittavat, niin pitää myös heidän vaeltaman, jokaisen paikassansa, lippuinsa alla.
verses.king_james: Then the tabernacle of the congregation shall set forward with the camp of the Levites in the midst of the camp: as they encamp, so shall they set forward, every man in his place by their standards.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ad occidentalem plagam erunt castra filiorum Ephraim, quorum princeps fuit Elisama filius Ammiud.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דֶּ֣גֶל מַחֲנֵ֥ה אֶפְרַ֛יִם לְצִבְאֹתָ֖ם יָ֑מָּה וְנָשִׂיא֙ לִבְנֵ֣י אֶפְרַ֔יִם אֱלִישָׁמָ֖ע בֶּן־עַמִּיהֽוּד׃
verses.douay_rheims: On the west side shall be the camp of the sons of Ephraim, whose prince was Elisama the son of Ammiud.
verses.finnish_biblia: Lännen puolelle pitää Ephraimin itsensä sioittaman lippunsa ja joukkonsa kanssa, heidän päämiehensä Elisama Ammihudin poika,
verses.king_james: On the west side shall be the standard of the camp of Ephraim according to their armies: and the captain of the sons of Ephraim shall be Elishama the son of Ammihud.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cunctus exercitus pugnatorum ejus, qui numerati sunt, quadraginta millia quingenti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּצְבָא֖וֹ וּפְקֻדֵיהֶ֑ם אַרְבָּעִ֥ים אֶ֖לֶף וַחֲמֵ֥שׁ מֵאֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: The whole army of his fighting men, that were numbered, were forty thousand five hundred.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hänen joukkonsa luetut, neljäkymmentä tuhatta ja viisisataa.
verses.king_james: And his host, and those that were numbered of them, were forty thousand and five hundred.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et cum eis tribus filiorum Manasse, quorum princeps fuit Gamaliel filius Phadassur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעָלָ֖יו מַטֵּ֣ה מְנַשֶּׁ֑ה וְנָשִׂיא֙ לִבְנֵ֣י מְנַשֶּׁ֔ה גַּמְלִיאֵ֖ל בֶּן־פְּדָהצֽוּר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And with them the tribe of the sons of Manasses, whose prince was Gamaliel the son of Phadassur.
verses.finnish_biblia: Lähin häntä pitää Manassen sukukunnan itsensä sioittaman: heidän päämiehensä Gamliel Pedatsurin poika,
verses.king_james: And by him shall be the tribe of Manasseh: and the captain of the children of Manasseh shall be Gamaliel the son of Pedahzur.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cunctusque exercitus pugnatorum ejus, qui numerati sunt, triginta duo millia ducenti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּצְבָא֖וֹ וּפְקֻדֵיהֶ֑ם שְׁנַ֧יִם וּשְׁלֹשִׁ֛ים אֶ֖לֶף וּמָאתָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the whole army of his fighting men, that were numbered, were thirty-two thousand two hundred.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hänen joukkonsa luetut, kaksineljättäkymmentä tuhatta ja kaksisataa.
verses.king_james: And his host, and those that were numbered of them, were thirty and two thousand and two hundred.

verses.latin_vulgate: In tribu filiorum Benjamin princeps fuit Abidan filius Gedeonis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמַטֵּ֖ה בִּנְיָמִ֑ן וְנָשִׂיא֙ לִבְנֵ֣י בִנְיָמִ֔ן אֲבִידָ֖ן בֶּן־גִּדְעֹנִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the tribe of the sons of Benjamin the prince was Abidan the son of Gedeon.
verses.finnish_biblia: Senjälkeen BenJaminin sukukunta: heidän päämiehensä Abidan Gideonin poika,
verses.king_james: Then the tribe of Benjamin: and the captain of the sons of Benjamin shall be Abidan the son of Gideoni.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et cunctus exercitus pugnatorum ejus, qui recensiti sunt, triginta quinque millia quadringenti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּצְבָא֖וֹ וּפְקֻדֵיהֶ֑ם חֲמִשָּׁ֧ה וּשְׁלֹשִׁ֛ים אֶ֖לֶף וְאַרְבַּ֥ע מֵאֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the whole army of fighting men, that were reckoned up, were thirty-five thousand four hundred.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hänen joukkonsa luetut, viisineljättäkymmentä tuhatta ja neljäsataa.
verses.king_james: And his host, and those that were numbered of them, were thirty and five thousand and four hundred.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnes qui numerati sunt in castris Ephraim, centum octo millia centum per turmas suas : tertii proficiscentur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּֽל־הַפְּקֻדִ֞ים לְמַחֲנֵ֣ה אֶפְרַ֗יִם מְאַ֥ת אֶ֛לֶף וּשְׁמֹֽנַת־אֲלָפִ֥ים וּמֵאָ֖ה לְצִבְאֹתָ֑ם וּשְׁלִשִׁ֖ים יִסָּֽעוּ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: All that were numbered in the camp of Ephraim, were a hundred and eight-thousand one hundred by their troops: they shall march in the third place.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kaikki Ephraimin leirissä luetut, satatuhatta, ja kahdeksantuhatta, ja sata, heidän joukoissansa. Ja heidän pitää kolmantena vaeltaman.
verses.king_james: All that were numbered of the camp of Ephraim were an hundred thousand and eight thousand and an hundred, throughout their armies. And they shall go forward in the third rank.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ad aquilonis partem castrametati sunt filii Dan : quorum princeps fuit Ahiezer filius Ammisaddai.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דֶּ֣גֶל מַחֲנֵ֥ה דָ֛ן צָפֹ֖נָה לְצִבְאֹתָ֑ם וְנָשִׂיא֙ לִבְנֵ֣י דָ֔ן אֲחִיעֶ֖זֶר בֶּן־עַמִּֽישַׁדָּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: On the north side camped the sons of Dan: whose prince was Ahiezar the son of Ammisaddai.
verses.finnish_biblia: Pohjan puolella pitää Danin sioituslippu oleman heidän joukkoinsa jälkeen, ja Danin lasten päämies Ahieser AmmiSaddain poika,
verses.king_james: The standard of the camp of Dan shall be on the north side by their armies: and the captain of the children of Dan shall be Ahiezer the son of Ammishaddai.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cunctus exercitus pugnatorum ejus, qui numerati sunt, sexaginta duo millia septingenti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּצְבָא֖וֹ וּפְקֻדֵיהֶ֑ם שְׁנַ֧יִם וְשִׁשִּׁ֛ים אֶ֖לֶף וּשְׁבַ֥ע מֵאֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: The whole army of his fighting men, that were numbered, were sixty-two thousand seven hundred.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hänen joukkonsa luetut, kaksiseitsemättäkymmentä tuhatta ja seitsemänsataa.
verses.king_james: And his host, and those that were numbered of them, were threescore and two thousand and seven hundred.

verses.latin_vulgate: Juxta eum fixere tentoria de tribu Aser : quorum princeps fuit Phegiel filius Ochran.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַחֹנִ֥ים עָלָ֖יו מַטֵּ֣ה אָשֵׁ֑ר וְנָשִׂיא֙ לִבְנֵ֣י אָשֵׁ֔ר פַּגְעִיאֵ֖ל בֶּן־עׇכְרָֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: Beside him they of the tribe of Aser pitched their tents: whose prince was Phegiel the son of Ochran.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hänen viereensä pitää Asserin sukukunnan heitänsä sioittaman, ja Asserin lasten päämies Pagiel Okranin poika,
verses.king_james: And those that encamp by him shall be the tribe of Asher: and the captain of the children of Asher shall be Pagiel the son of Ocran.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cunctus exercitus pugnatorum ejus, qui numerati sunt, quadraginta millia et mille quingenti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּצְבָא֖וֹ וּפְקֻדֵיהֶ֑ם אֶחָ֧ד וְאַרְבָּעִ֛ים אֶ֖לֶף וַחֲמֵ֥שׁ מֵאֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: The whole army of his fighting men, that were numbered, were forty-one thousand five hundred.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hänen joukkonsa luetut, yksiviidettäkymmentä tuhatta ja viisisataa.
verses.king_james: And his host, and those that were numbered of them, were forty and one thousand and five hundred.

verses.latin_vulgate: De tribu filiorum Nephthali princeps fuit Ahira filius Enan.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמַטֵּ֖ה נַפְתָּלִ֑י וְנָשִׂיא֙ לִבְנֵ֣י נַפְתָּלִ֔י אֲחִירַ֖ע בֶּן־עֵינָֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: Of the tribe of the sons of Nephtali the prince was Ahira the son of Enan.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sitälikin Naphtalin sukukunta, ja Naphtalin lasten päämies Ahira Enanin poika,
verses.king_james: Then the tribe of Naphtali: and the captain of the children of Naphtali shall be Ahira the son of Enan.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cunctus exercitus pugnatorum ejus, quinquaginta tria millia quadringenti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּצְבָא֖וֹ וּפְקֻדֵיהֶ֑ם שְׁלֹשָׁ֧ה וַחֲמִשִּׁ֛ים אֶ֖לֶף וְאַרְבַּ֥ע מֵאֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: The whole army of his fighting men, were fifty-three thousand four hundred.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hänen joukkonsa luetut, kolmekuudettakymmentä tuhatta ja neljäsataa.
verses.king_james: And his host, and those that were numbered of them, were fifty and three thousand and four hundred.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnes qui numerati sunt in castris Dan, fuerunt centum quinquaginta septem millia sexcenti : et novissimi proficiscentur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־הַפְּקֻדִים֙ לְמַ֣חֲנֵה דָ֔ן מְאַ֣ת אֶ֗לֶף וְשִׁבְעָ֧ה וַחֲמִשִּׁ֛ים אֶ֖לֶף וְשֵׁ֣שׁ מֵא֑וֹת לָאַחֲרֹנָ֥ה יִסְע֖וּ לְדִגְלֵיהֶֽם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: All that were numbered in the camp of Dan, were a hundred and fifty-seven thousand six hundred: and they shall march last.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin että kaikki Danin leirissä luetut ovat satatuhatta, seitsemänkuudettakymmentä tuhatta ja kuusisataa. Ja heidän pitää viimeisenä vaeltaman lippunsa alla.
verses.king_james: All they that were numbered in the camp of Dan were an hundred thousand and fifty and seven thousand and six hundred. They shall go hindmost with their standards.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hic numerus filiorum Israël, per domos cognationum suarum et turmas divisi exercitus, sexcenta tria millia quingenti quinquaginta.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֛לֶּה פְּקוּדֵ֥י בְנֵֽי־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל לְבֵ֣ית אֲבֹתָ֑ם כׇּל־פְּקוּדֵ֤י הַֽמַּחֲנֹת֙ לְצִבְאֹתָ֔ם שֵׁשׁ־מֵא֥וֹת אֶ֙לֶף֙ וּשְׁלֹ֣שֶׁת אֲלָפִ֔ים וַחֲמֵ֥שׁ מֵא֖וֹת וַחֲמִשִּֽׁים׃
verses.douay_rheims: This is the number of the children of Israel, of their army divided according to the houses of their kindreds and their troops, six hundred and three thousand five hundred and fifty.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tämä on Israelin lasten luku heidän isäinsä huonetten jälkeen, kaikkein heidän leirinsä luettuin ja joukkoinsa kanssa: kuusisataa tuhatta ja kolmetuhatta, viisisataa ja viisikymmentä.
verses.king_james: These are those which were numbered of the children of Israel by the house of their fathers: all those that were numbered of the camps throughout their hosts were six hundred thousand and three thousand and five hundred and fifty.

verses.latin_vulgate: Levitæ autem non sunt numerati inter filios Israël : sic enim præceperat Dominus Moysi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַ֨לְוִיִּ֔ם לֹ֣א הׇתְפָּקְד֔וּ בְּת֖וֹךְ בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל כַּאֲשֶׁ֛ר צִוָּ֥ה יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶת־מֹשֶֽׁה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Levites were not numbered among the children of Israel: for so the Lord had commanded Moses.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Leviläiset ei ole luetut Israelin lasten lukuun, niinkuin Herra Mosekselle oli käskenyt.
verses.king_james: But the Levites were not numbered among the children of Israel; as the Lord commanded Moses.

verses.latin_vulgate: Feceruntque filii Israël juxta omnia quæ mandaverat Dominus. Castrametati sunt per turmas suas, et profecti per familias ac domos patrum suorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיַּעֲשׂ֖וּ בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל כְּ֠כֹ֠ל אֲשֶׁר־צִוָּ֨ה יְהֹוָ֜ה אֶת־מֹשֶׁ֗ה כֵּֽן־חָנ֤וּ לְדִגְלֵיהֶם֙ וְכֵ֣ן נָסָ֔עוּ אִ֥ישׁ לְמִשְׁפְּחֹתָ֖יו עַל־בֵּ֥ית אֲבֹתָֽיו׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And the children of Israel did according to all things that the Lord had commanded. They camped by their troops, and marched by the families and houses of their fathers.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Israelin lapset tekivät sen: kaiken sen jälkeen, kuin Herra oli Mosekselle käskenyt, sioittivat he heitänsä lippuinsa alle ja matkustivat itsekukin sukukunnassansa, isäinsä huoneen jälkeen.
verses.king_james: And the children of Israel did according to all that the Lord commanded Moses: so they pitched by their standards, and so they set forward, every one after their families, according to the house of their fathers.
